title: Bring up an ADC and DAC sampling pipeline
description: Validate clocking, full-scale range, and loopback fidelity before trusting captured or generated samples.
body: Use when commissioning a new data-converter path on a board or eval kit. Do not interpret captured data before confirming the sample clock and reference voltage. Actions: verify the converter clock frequency, run a known full-scale tone through a loopback, and compare the captured spectrum against the generated one. Validation signals include a clean single tone at the expected bin and a measured signal-to-noise-and-distortion ratio near the datasheet value. Risk boundary: a misconfigured reference voltage silently scales every sample, so escalate any full-scale mismatch before downstream calibration.
